# Abhishek Das

> Co-CEO and Co-Founder of Yutori, building AI agents that browse and act on the
> web for you, autonomously. Previously a PhD at Georgia Tech (early work on
> agents that see, talk, and act, and on Grad-CAM) and a Research Scientist at
> FAIR (Meta), where he helped start the Open Catalyst Project.

## Profile

- Name: Abhishek Das
- Role: Co-CEO and Co-Founder, Yutori (https://yutori.com)
- Education: PhD, Georgia Tech (2016–2020); B.Tech, IIT Roorkee
- Email: abhshkdz@gmail.com
